applies_to: AV_2022 tables in thousands; ACFR monetary tables as published
notes: FRS valuation liability and benefit tables often publish amounts in thousands.

check_name: Active headcount reconciles to reported total
applies_to: AV Appendix C DB counts; ACFR active-member tables
notes: Compare only after matching scope and year.

applies_to: ACFR payroll tables; built salary/headcount artifacts; valuation payroll context
notes: DB-only versus system-wide payroll must be distinguished.

check_name: Class totals reconcile to plan total
applies_to: FRS class artifacts and class totals in AV/ACFR
notes: Important for payroll, AAL, and annuitant totals.
Differences are expected in some cases and should be explained, not suppressed.
Current config uses the 2022 ACFR column for some values even though 2023 is present.
Money in dollars, rates in decimals, counts unscaled.

check_name: Provenance metadata complete enough for review
Printed versus PDF page references are distinguished
notes: Printed pages are primary human-facing citations; PDF pages should be added when practical.

check_name: Legacy unresolved items are separated from new estimations
notes: Reason-era unresolved reconstruction should not be conflated with new-plan estimation methods.

applies_to: Generated FRS runtime artifacts versus plans/frs/**

notes: Runtime-only fields should be separated logically in the comparison.
